_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.
_publications._context: To generate a minipig model of NF1, we mimicked a recurrent nonsense mutation p.Arg1947X (R1947X) identified in 62 of 8100 (± 8) unrelated and symptomatic NF1 patients
